dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION Ecoza topical foam, 1% is for topical use only. Ecoza topical foam, 1% is not for oral, ophthalmic, or intravaginal use. Ecoza topical foam, 1% should be applied to cover affected areas once daily for 4 weeks. For topical use only; not for oral, ophthalmic, or intravaginal use. ( 2 ) Apply once daily for 4 weeks. ( 2 )
